payload.name: Review the plan at .opencode/plans for any issues
payload.description: Review the plan at .opencode/plans for any issues

goal.answer: Produce an independent review of .opencode/plans/revised-integration-plan.md to identify residual issues the automated reviewer loop missed, and verify that the 49 previously-closed fixes remain correctly present in the current plan text.

payload.plain: Produce an independent review of .opencode/plans/revised-integration-plan.md to identify residual issues the automated reviewer loop missed, and verify that the 49 previously-closed fixes remain correctly present in the current plan text.

criteria.answer:
A written review document is produced identifying issues in .opencode/plans/revised-integration-plan.md not already tracked in .opencode/loop/open-issues.md, saved to a persistent project file.
Each identified issue references the exact plan section/line and includes a severity classification (blocker/major/minor), description, and concrete fix recommendation.
A spot-check verification is performed on at least 3 previously-closed issues to confirm their fixes are still present and correct in the current plan text.
The review covers cross-section consistency (e.g., imports, type references, endpoint-to-method mappings) that automated reviewers may have missed.
If no new issues are found, the review document explicitly states 'No new issues identified' and documents the spot-check results.

plain: A written review document is produced identifying issues in .opencode/plans/revised-integration-plan.md not already tracked in .opencode/loop/open-issues.md, saved to a persistent project file.
Each identified issue references the exact plan section/line and includes a severity classification (blocker/major/minor), description, and concrete fix recommendation.
A spot-check verification is performed on at least 3 previously-closed issues to confirm their fixes are still present and correct in the current plan text.
The review covers cross-section consistency (e.g., imports, type references, endpoint-to-method mappings) that automated reviewers may have missed.
If no new issues are found, the review document explicitly states 'No new issues identified' and documents the spot-check results.

constraints.answer: Do not duplicate issues already tracked in .opencode/loop/open-issues.md., Use targeted reads only (do not read entire source files end-to-end)., Validate findings against actual source code where possible., Write all findings to files, not chat.

plain: Do not duplicate issues already tracked in .opencode/loop/open-issues.md.
Use targeted reads only (do not read entire source files end-to-end).
Validate findings against actual source code where possible.
Write all findings to files, not chat.

phaseSnapshots.name: Plan Inspection & Review Document
phaseSnapshots.goal: Read the plan and existing issue files, identify new issues via targeted inspection, spot-check previously-closed fixes, and write the review output.

steps.description: Read .opencode/loop/open-issues.md to establish the known-issue baseline and avoid duplication.
Target-read plan sections for import/type/dead-code inconsistencies (contracts.py imports, service.py imports, dead methods, unreachable helpers).
Spot-check 3 previously-closed issues in the current plan text to confirm fixes are present (e.g., REACT_DIST path, empty-prose fallback, model_history field).
Write the review document to .opencode/loop/new-review-issues.md with findings, severity, and fix recommendations.
Append a compact spot-check entry to .opencode/loop/review-log.md.

assumptions.answer: The automated reviewer loop completed 9 rounds and closed 49 issues.; The plan claims readiness for implementation but may contain residual defects.; Python 3.11+ with Pydantic AI 1.106+ is the target environment.; @agent.instructions is a real Pydantic AI decorator (verified against installed package).
